title: glaucothea aculeata
intro: Glaucothea aculeata, also known as the prickly glaucothea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of glaucothea aculeata include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, glaucothea aculeata is often dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to create a topical application for its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Journal of the Indian Medical Association", glaucothea aculeata showed healing capacity in allergic conjunctivitis, which was certainly better than the placebo.
